prompt: {"type":"advanced character card","style":"clean fashion character design sheet, photorealistic studio catalog aesthetic, soft even lighting, minimal shadows, muted gray background, thin white panel dividers, polished single-canvas layout","subject":{"gender_presentation":"teen girl","age_appearance":"young teenager","identity":"face intentionally obscured and de-emphasized","hair":{"color":"dark brown","style":"center-parted long hair in two braids"},"outfit":{"count":5,"pieces":["oversized pastel lavender hoodie with drawstrings and kangaroo pocket","short white pleated skirt visible below hoodie hem","white crew socks","chunky white sneakers","no visible jewelry"]},"overall_look":"cute casual pastel streetwear, soft youthful styling"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"turnaround views","position":"left half","count":4,"labels":["FRONT VIEW","BACK VIEW","SIDE PROFILE","ACTION POSE"],"details":"full-body character shown in four separate vertical panels; front standing straight with arms relaxed, back standing straight, side profile standing neutrally, and playful action pose with one leg bent backward and body turned slightly toward camera"},{"title":"FACIAL EXPRESSIONS","position":"top right","count":5,"labels":["NEUTRAL","ANGRY","HAPPY","SAD","FOCUSED"],"details":"five tightly cropped head-and-shoulders portraits in a horizontal row, each with the same hairstyle and hoodie, subtle expression changes, face area softly blurred"},{"title":"ACCESSORIES","position":"bottom right","count":5,"labels":["lavender backpack","white smartphone","lavender scrunchie","white over-ear headphones","lavender compact camera"],"details":"accessories evenly spaced on gray background like product cutouts"}],"centerpiece":"the 4-view full-body outfit turnaround dominates the composition"},"color_palette":{"count":4,"colors":["pastel lavender","white","soft gray","dark brown"]},"prompt":"Create a single-canvas advanced character card for {argument name=\"character name\" default=\"a teen girl\"} in a photorealistic studio fashion-sheet style. Show a consistent young girl with {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"dark brown\"} hair in two braids, wearing an oversized {argument name=\"hoodie color\" default=\"pastel lavender\"} hoodie, a short white pleated skirt, white crew socks, and chunky white sneakers. Use a clean gray background with thin white dividers and neatly organized panels. On the left half, include 4 full-body turnaround panels labeled FRONT VIEW, BACK VIEW, SIDE PROFILE, and ACTION POSE. On the top right, include 5 headshot expression panels labeled NEUTRAL, ANGRY, HAPPY, SAD, and FOCUSED. On the bottom right, include 5 accessory items arranged horizontally: a lavender backpack, a white smartphone, a lavender scrunchie, white over-ear headphones, and a lavender compact camera. Keep lighting soft and even, composition symmetrical and professional, emphasizing 100% character consistency across all views. Preserve the minimal pastel aesthetic and use {argument name=\"background color\" default=\"soft gray\"} as the backdrop."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"高级角色卡","style":"简洁时尚角色设计图，照片级真实感摄影棚目录美学，柔和均匀的灯光，极简阴影，柔和灰色背景，白色细线条面板分割，精致的单画布布局","subject":{"gender_presentation":"少女","age_appearance":"青少年","identity":"面部刻意模糊并弱化处理","hair":{"color":"深棕色","style":"中分长发，编成两条辫子"},"outfit":{"count":5,"pieces":["超大款淡紫色连帽衫，带抽绳和袋鼠兜","连帽衫下摆可见的白色短款百褶裙","白色中筒袜","厚底白色运动鞋","无明显首饰"]},"overall_look":"可爱休闲的淡色系街头风，柔和的青春造型"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"三视图","position":"左半部分","count":4,"labels":["正面视图","背面视图","侧面轮廓","动作姿势"],"details":"全身角色展示在四个独立的垂直面板中；正面直立，双臂放松；背面直立；侧面自然站立；以及一条腿向后弯曲、身体略微转向镜头的俏皮动作姿势"},{"title":"面部表情","position":"右上角","count":5,"labels":["中性","生气","开心","悲伤","专注"],"details":"五个紧凑的头部及肩部肖像横向排列，发型和连帽衫保持一致，表情细微变化，面部区域轻微模糊"},{"title":"配饰","position":"右下角","count":5,"labels":["淡紫色背包","白色智能手机","淡紫色发圈","白色头戴式耳机","淡紫色便携相机"],"details":"配饰在灰色背景上均匀分布，如同产品剪影"}],"centerpiece":"4 视图全身服装展示占据构图主体"},"color_palette":{"count":4,"colors":["淡紫色","白色","柔和灰色","深棕色"]},"prompt":"创建一个单画布高级角色卡，用于 {argument name=\"character name\" default=\"一位少女\"}，采用照片级真实感的摄影棚时尚设计图风格。展示一位连贯的少女，留着 {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"深棕色\"} 的双辫发型，穿着超大款 {argument name=\"hoodie color\" default=\"淡紫色\"} 连帽衫、白色短款百褶裙、白色中筒袜和厚底白色运动鞋。使用简洁的灰色背景，配以白色细分割线和整齐的面板布局。在左半部分，包含 4 个全身展示面板，分别标注为 FRONT VIEW（正面视图）、BACK VIEW（背面视图）、SIDE PROFILE（侧面轮廓）和 ACTION POSE（动作姿势）。在右上角，包含 5 个头部表情面板，分别标注为 NEUTRAL（中性）、ANGRY（生气）、HAPPY（开心）、SAD（悲伤）和 FOCUSED（专注）。在右下角，包含 5 个横向排列的配饰：淡紫色背包、白色智能手机、淡紫色发圈、白色头戴式耳机和淡紫色便携相机。保持灯光柔和均匀，构图对称且专业，强调所有视图中 100% 的角色一致性。保持极简的淡色系美学，并使用 {argument name=\"background color\" default=\"柔和灰色\"} 作为背景。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 柔和色调青少年角色设计图：此提示词可生成具有照片级真实感的多面板角色一致性设计图，包含三视图、面部表情及配饰，适用于角色设计和视频前期制作。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: symmetrical, full-body, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
